# piano-keyboard

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sonata PitchAxis: full 88-key piano keyboard rendered below the vertical roll. Requires the pitch-plane capability and draws every key from the display's published projection, so falling-note columns land exactly on their keys.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Sonata.PitchAxis` "piano-keyboard" → `PianoKeyboard`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
